source_pr.title: *: fix gofail test.
source_pr.body: use `make gofail` to run tests with gofail.

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR restructures gofail-related tests (move them into `// +build gofail` files) and adds a dedicated `make gofail` target to enable/disable failpoints while running those tests. The case evidence here is only a Makefile label ("race: parserlib") without CI logs or a flaky failure signature, so we conservatively classify it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
